rawAssistant: A lone figure such as yourself ventures into Hollowfen, no doubt drawn by whispers of the Wilderward's secrets. I've been tracking your progress, and I must say, you show promise. But promise is a fleeting thing, easily lost in the unforgiving vastness of this land. Still, I'll give you credit: your charm hoop suggests a certain... flair. That's a quality I can appreciate. Now, let's see if it serves you well against the trials ahead.
